summary: Convergence loop vector smoke linkage and budget telemetry delivered. run_convergence_vector_smoke.py reads a baseline manifest, filters evidence cards by reviewStatus (default: accepted/staged-a/candidate), exports them via build_vector_records(), and emits per-source backpressure-telemetry-ledger.v0.1 rows. Production namespace blocked by default. Smoke 6/6 pass.

artifacts.description: run_convergence_vector_smoke(baseline_manifest_path, *, dry_run=True, namespace, allow_production_namespace=False, review_status_filter, repo_root): reads externalCardsPath + globalCandidateCardsPath from baseline, filters by reviewStatus, calls build_vector_records(), returns report with guards + budgetTelemetryRows. CLI: --baseline-manifest, --namespace, --allow-production-namespace, --review-status, --output.
Added build_vector_records(rows, *, run_id, source_id, artifact_uri, namespace, canonical_writes=False) and iter_evidence_cards(path) public helpers for use by convergence-loop vector smoke runner.

6 tests: dry-run-ok (exported>=1, namespace=*-smoke), production-namespace-blocked (ValueError raised), production-namespace-allowed-when-flag-set (ok=True), report-schema (all required keys), no-id-cards-rejected (rejectedCount>=2), budget-telemetry-format (backpressure-telemetry-ledger.v0.1, canonicalWrites=False). All 6 pass.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Script reads convergence baseline and exports cards through vector record exporter in smoke namespace only
acceptanceMapping.evidence: run_convergence_vector_smoke.py reads externalCardsPath/globalCandidateCardsPath; default namespace=sanguo-rag-convergence-smoke-<runId>; test dry-run-ok PASS

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Production namespace blocked by default; allow-production-namespace flag required
acceptanceMapping.evidence: _validate_namespace() raises ValueError when namespace.endswith('-prod') and allow_production=False; test production-namespace-blocked PASS; test production-namespace-allowed-when-flag-set PASS

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Budget telemetry emitted in backpressure-telemetry-ledger.v0.1 format per source ID
acceptanceMapping.evidence: _build_telemetry_row() returns schemaVersion=backpressure-telemetry-ledger.v0.1 with signal.vectorBudgetUtilization; test budget-telemetry-format PASS

acceptanceMapping.criterion: canonicalWrites always False; no hardcoded strings
acceptanceMapping.evidence: canonicalWrites=False hardcoded in build_vector_records call; namespace/runId/sourceId from manifest or env; test budget-telemetry-format confirms canonicalWrites=False

acceptanceMapping.criterion: Cards without valid evidenceId are rejected
acceptanceMapping.evidence: Inner loop checks evidence_id; missing → rejected_count++; test no-id-cards-rejected: rejected>=2 PASS

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0606: Update runbook, handoff, and promotion checklist with M6 convergence loop integration steps.
